summary: Phase 3 of Godot migration: added 6 gameplay autoloads (building_manager, graphic_card_manager, animation_manager, menu_manager, pop_log_manager, item_manager), 2 scene-level systems (grid_placement_system, input_manager), static building_scene_generator, scenes/building.tscn (Node2D+TileMap+Camera2D+CellIndicator+Buildings container), and integrated all into main.tscn with new VoltLabel. PlayerManager now pulls per-second money/volt from BuildingManager.get_money_per_second()/get_volt_per_second() which sums placed-card contributions with fallback to building's own rate. Single commit c27e93a, 416 insertions across 15 files. Unity source untouched (Phase 6).
